warmup: Convert 0.625 to a percentage and 47% to a fraction in simplest form. Show each step.

practice.title: Price Discount Calculator
practice.description: A laptop is marked at Rs 45,000. The shop offers a 20% discount, then a festival season discount of 10% on the reduced price. What is the final price? What is the total effective discount percentage?

practice.title: Population Growth
practice.description: A town's population was 80,000 in 2020. It grew by 5% in 2021, then declined by 3% in 2022. What is the population in 2022? What was the net % change from 2020 to 2022?

practice.title: Test Score Analysis
practice.description: A student scored 42 out of 60 in a test. In the next test, they scored 55 out of 80. In which test did they perform better by percentage? What is the difference in percentages?

practice.title: Successive Change Verification
practice.description: Write a general function that takes two percentage changes (e.g., +20 and -15) and returns the net effective percentage change using the formula: a + b + ab/100. Verify with three test cases.

practice.title: Price Recovery
practice.description: A product's price is increased by 25%. By what percentage must it be reduced to return to the original price? Verify your answer is correct.
